AC: 5
WIS: +3 INT: +3
WT: 1.8 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: FEET
AC: 5
WIS: +3 INT: +3
WT: 1.8 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Kunark Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):78, 136, 243
Stackable:No

Rarity: Rare

a crystal purifier

Saw a guy with four of these on Vazaelle selling them for 150 pp a piece. I was going to buy a pair when my phone rang, as I was talking all four sold. Oh, well, I hope he comes back.

Purifier
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2002 at 7:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966239343
4 posts
got these ladt night off the drachnid purifier we camped the queens room for about 6hrs and this mob only poppped once. retainer lurker and queen popped at least 10-15 times each ...hope it helps
▲ Page top
Ooops forgot
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2002 at 11:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361985510
20 posts
Forgot to tell ya you need to bum a sow sow u can pull her there and not get hit by the other crawlers.And this spawn isnt that rare.Ive seen her there alot more than what you guys are saying

RE: Ooops forgot
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2002 at 12:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774718053
3 posts
I just picked these up tonight On the Prexus Server, i paid 180p for them thinkin i got a good deal now..lol
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 20 2002 at 10:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Want to know a secret?U can solo the purifier at 35 if you know what to do.I play on Sullon Zek and in the broken bridge room in CC there is a spot where u can pull anything to and it cant hit you.Say your running in the broken bridge room heading towards the geos right before u leave the actual room and enter the hallway stay on the path right before the line on the floor that shows where the room ends.U can stand right there and nuke her or anything to death without being touched.She will not cross the line.And yeah i know this is an xploit blah blah suk it.They know its there but they fail to change it so its there fault not mine. Peace
Finally got them!
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2002 at 11:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774830054
19 posts
I got these boots last night after hunting them for nearly 20 lvls and giving up. I was pulling the queen room farming silk (god I hate tailoring!) when the purifier popped. I was beginning to think that these had been nerfed out of the game, this is only the second drop I've seen and I've leveled 3 toons in CC.

As a side note, it is possible to single pull the queen room. I'm not sure if it's level related as I never tried this until I was big enough to handle a full spawn (root DOT and move) if they all agroed.

I went in expecting to draw the full spawn figuring I'd root and ove down the tunnel and dal with them individually. Dropped a root on the first spider and no agroe! DOTed it and when the root broke only that spider attacked. I was able to take them all singly using this technique with only the occasional roamer add.

One word of caution, there's several spiderlings that like to wonder through hit you once and run into the queen room, this will agro every spider in the place. make sure that no roamers make it into the room or you'll deal with the full spawn.
▲ Page top
mob level
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2002 at 5:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762349640
View User Forum
52 posts
could this be camped solo by a 48 druid? i would like to get a pair of these and dont see the point in spending 1k if i can just spend some time there and get them.

and no, i dont have better at my level, and yes, GEBs are better but they are butt-ugly. period. i have a ton of wis, want them for the look :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 12 2002 at 6:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) wow thats kind of sad that you would want boots w/ 3 wis over ones w/ 9, just because of look. thats dr00d for you.
RE: mob level
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2002 at 11:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774830054
19 posts
Soloing the purifier won't be the problem, keeping the area clear and dealing with adds will be. The purifier is a fairly rare spawn and I seriously doubt you could solo the queen (a more common spawn). Myself and my ranger partner (both 50) can take the queen quite easilly but I'd be very leery to attempt a solo.

Assumng that you can get a purifier pop before you see the queen and you're lucky enough not to get any runner adds, it could be done. That's a lot of ifs though.

Polzevog Windwisper
50 druid and Crimson Bandito
TP server
▲ Page top
Loaded
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 3:48 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767675099
136 posts
Purifier popped for me last night as a queen PH and only after 3 PH's were killed. so after only 1 hour last night, i had myself a nice new set of boots :) must say, i was extremely happy :)

▲ Page top
How much can I get these for on fenni ro?
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 8:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361674561
37 posts
If someone could please tell the price I really want to scrape all the plat I have together and get a pair of these boots. Since they are not lore, isn't the market flooded with them?
▲ Page top
It depends
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 4:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759061100
35 posts
Each server is different, but THEY ARE RARE, as far as I know, only like 10 people on the Rathe May have them since they are deep in a dungeon that high levels ignore and lowerlevels are too weak to go into.
Also, the monster's that drop it are rare and pretty well guarded.

Also, like GEBS, which only retain their huge value due to stats, they are awesome since they are all/all and add wis and int, not many boots do that.

Plus, they are a neat blue color, blue banded to be exact.

I still have mine on my cleric alt since i just got GEBS yesterday for my main char.

Don't expect them to be much less then 1k, and thats if you even see them for sale anywhere.

Kajaina lvl 43 Druid of The Rathe

▲ Page top
RE: How much can I get these for on fenni ro?
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 7:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765785965
View User Forum
59 posts
Purifier is an extremely rare spawn, so don't expect the market to be flooded.
▲ Page top
RE: How much can I get these for on fenni ro?
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593374966959
View User Forum
Scholar
91 posts
They sell for 2kpp on Povar, and Finni Ro's prices are usually a bit more than Povar, from what I remember of reading EQPrices before it started costing $$, so 2500pp would be a safe bet.


▲ Page top
Got the boots, NICE graphic! :)
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 5:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760595894
8 posts
I GOT these boots last night, I couldn't believe it! Woot! (And THANK YOU Adiwen!)

The graphic on these boots is great! I have not yet taken them anywhere but the caverns and think they may show up differently in different environments. I ran into someone in the EC tunnel wearing these boots and they appeared black.

However in the Caverns these boots are the EXACT same shade of blue and gray as the Crystalline Robes. VERY sharp looking! Wearing the Crystalline Robes and the Crystal Lined Slippers is a dynamite combination, top notch! Can't wait to take them out and around somewhere to see if someone comments on them! (And also to see if they darken so that I can still wear them with my Advisors Robe...)

Kishi
Enchanter of 35 Circles
Draconis Rampant

Homepage:
http://zhannon.tripod.com

Kishi's Statistics:
http://zhannon.tripod.com/kishis_statistics.htm

(Warning: this WILL take time to load up, be patient!

We camped the queen this evening, He conned even to a 35 monkey in our group :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 27 2001 at 6:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if anyone is on Bristlebane server, and wants to sell a pair of these for a ridiculous ammount of money, i wil buy = ) Give me a tell
Very nice, but rare !
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2001 at 5:19 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well, i am off to Eastern Wastes to camp these with some friends, we are all interested in many items to be found in Crystal Caverns, and are in our low 30's. so this is perfect for us. Wis boots are rare in the Game, and at our level, the only real two we have access to are these and the Burynai hide boots, +2 STR, +2 WIS, 5AC i think, but i may be off on the AC.

Those too, are a rare drop in Kurns tower, i have seen many, many Burynai hide arms drop, as well as the burynai hide cloak,but the boots are the rare - bear and as we no loner get exp off anything in Kurns, this sounds like a great place to go, level up, and have a chance at some good loot too. The Crystalline belt has WIS on it too, and WIS belts at mid 30's are also a hard item to come by, i like the sound of this place more and more!

and to that guy who posted about Golden Efreeti Boots, well, Iksar cant wear them at all,and level 30's can not take on the Efreeti, so use your head before you post next time, and consider race / level restrictions, ok ?

see ya in Velious!
Nebulonn Darkevoid
31 Iksar Shaman
Drinal Server
<High Council of Norrath>
▲ Page top
Priceless
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2001 at 8:34 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
These boots are WAY undervalued. They're stats may not be the best but they are simply stunning to look at. Nearly everywhere I go people are asking me what shoes I'm wearing. I've had quite numerous offers for these shoes but I simply wont sell them. Simply put they're priceless =D

Cesare Sinferno
45 druid of The Nameless server

__DEL__1621211284492

▲ Page top
RE: Priceless
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 12:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570542746
10 posts
I don't know that I would call them stunning but they are interesting looking. I am also a high elf. On me, the boots are the same shade as the dark part of the Blackened Crystalline Robe. It's a very, very dark aqua. Most of the time they look black unless light hits them. Where ever the light hits, you see their greenish-blue color.
▲ Page top
these shoes are BLUE
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2001 at 2:37 AM Rating: Default

Anonymous
these shoes are dark blue (on gnome at least :) )

Info
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2001 at 11:59 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The crystal purifier spawns from minutes-days. It spawns in the queen's spawn. Out of the 5 or so times I have seen the purifier pop, he has dropped the boots once. The boots have a black shade to them and they are just plain cool. Next step - GEBs. =p
▲ Page top
Graphic
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2001 at 11:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756630917
6 posts
What do they look like? In these fashion conscious times why does no-one ever say this?
▲ Page top
RE: Graphic
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 8:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965748058
76 posts
On a wood elf these boots look black, with a muted blue band around the top where they would normally join into the leggings.

They are not the most fashionable of footware, but they are most acceptable to me and definately serve to make me look different to every other blonde wood elf with BCP wearing GEB's

▲ Page top
RE: Graphic
QuoteReply
# May 16 2001 at 12:34 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245616726
Scholar
103 posts
On my male wood elf they look medium blue. I get questioned all the time about where they come from, and haven't run into anyone else using these since I got them. I wish they showed through into wolf form in a way, so they his paws would be bluish colored. hehe

Deamos Shadowblade
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2001 at 10:25 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just got these today. They are indeed dropped from a Crystal Purifier. Looks like a lurker or retainer. He spawned in the queen's spot. Had the boots the first time. About 2hrs later he spawned in the first spider to the right of the queen's place. He had the sword and emerald that time. Never seen him before and have not sense then either.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 21 2001 at 11:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have nothing good to post, I have nothing good to say, but one thing I wanted to mention was the fact that yes, these are an ALTERNATIVE to Eboots, hell my wizard friend has like a wardrobe of robes to wear, SMR, froglok bone caster, guardian robe, and ya know what, he's got 201 int, and wears journeyman's boots, yes Jboots actualy worn, on his feet, cuz he thinks Eboots look gay. Hell, cloth sandals are an alternative to Eboots, not everyone can afford, want or even need to wear crappy gold eboots even if thier int/wis is not 200+.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 24 2001 at 11:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Whoa whoa
